title: rubus suberectus var. plicatus
intro: Rubus suberectus var. plicatus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan strawberry, is a type of plant belonging to the rose family, characterized by its unique, folded leaves and edible fruits. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rubus suberectus var. plicatus include reducing inflammation and improving digestive health, as well as having potential anti-cancer properties. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also eaten fresh or used in jams and preserves.
